scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c green,blue "npm run dev --workspace @mailer/frontend" "cross-env PORT=3001 npm run dev --workspace @mailer/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @mailer/frontend && npm run build --workspace @mailer/backend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c green,blue "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend"
